name: Hierarchical Annotation v1 (115-row pilot audit)
short_description: Three-level (global / subtask / atomic) hierarchical annotation of 115 benchmark tasks drawn from FrontierScience-Olympiad, SWE-bench Verified, tau-bench, and WorkArena++. Includes a 12-row LLM-as-judge spot-check.
size_description: 115 rows total (FrontierScience-Olympiad=40, SWE-bench Verified=23, WorkArena++=26, tau-bench=26); each row carries a global / subtask / atomic hierarchy and gold-action triple. Twelve rows (three per benchmark) carry an LLM-as-judge verdict.

files.description: 115-row JSONL with the canonical hierarchical annotation schema and judge verdicts merged in for the 12 sampled rows.
